TicketSwap

★4.3/5(9,800 reviews)· Est. 2012

About TicketSwap

TicketSwap is a fan-first secondary ticket marketplace that caps resale prices at 20% above face value. Its fair pricing model and strong community focus make it the ethical choice for ticket resale, with verified tickets and instant mobile delivery.

Key Features

✓20% resale price cap
✓Verified authentic tickets
✓Instant mobile delivery
✓Fan community ratings
✓Easy listing process
✓European focus

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros
  • +Capped prices — fair for fans
  • +Strong verification process
  • +Ethical resale platform
  • +Great community trust
⚠️ Cons
  • –Limited inventory vs larger platforms
  • –Fewer UK sports events
Visit their official site to browse tickets:

TicketNexus

The UK's leading sports ticket comparison site. We help fans find the best prices from trusted resale platforms — so you never overpay for a seat.
